title: Valley - Digital Health Practice Management for Specialists
problem: Specialist clinics struggle with fragmented practice management tools. Scheduling, patient communication, and clinical documentation are siloed.
solution: Integrated practice management platform for specialist clinics including scheduling, patient portal, video consultations, and EHR integrations.
technology: SaaS platform, video conferencing, EHR integrations
regulatory_notes: GDPR compliance, healthcare data security standards.
varden_fit: High — practice management for clinics is core to Varden's ecosystem. Potential competitor or partnership opportunity.
notes: Swedish practice management. Direct overlap with Varden's value proposition.
